name: .cursorrules — Project Instructions
description: .cursorrules provides persistent instructions to Cursor's AI across all chat and Composer sessions.
content:
You are an expert engineer in this codebase.

## Tech Stack
- TypeScript + Node.js
- React 18 with hooks
- Tailwind CSS
- Vitest for testing

## Rules
- Never use var, always const/let
- Named exports over default exports
- Always type function parameters
- Read files before editing them
- Don't change unrelated code
- Run tests before finishing

name: .cursor/rules/ — Scoped Rules (v0.45+)
description: New .cursor/rules/ format (Cursor v0.45+) allows scoped rules per file pattern using MDC frontmatter.
content:
---
description: Frontend component rules
glob: src/components/**/*.tsx
---

# Frontend Rules

- Use Tailwind for all styling
- No inline styles
- Components must have TypeScript props interface
- Export named, not default
- Co-locate tests: Button.test.tsx next to Button.tsx

name: Cursor Settings JSON
description: Per-project Cursor settings for model selection and features.
